title: Cisco posts best day since 2011 on strong AI demand, CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle'
summary_full: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year
summary_public: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year
